title: Medical Packages by Age Demographic
content: XCare offers a variety of medical packages tailored to different age groups and demographics. Patients below 20 years old can purchase the Adolescent Package. Patients from 20 to 30 years old can purchase the Under30 Package. Patients from 31 to 45 years old can purchase the Middle Age Package. Patients above 45 years old can purchase the Senior Package. Additionally, female patients above 45 years old are eligible to purchase the Premium Package.

title: Medical Packages Pricing
content: All of our medical packages including the Adolescent Package, Under30 Package, Middle Age Package, Senior Package, and Premium Package are priced the same at $1000. For more details, patients can review all packages at our website www.xcare.com.
